outlook_paragraph: Occidental's drilling activity shows moderate expansion with 13 active sites at decision date, 6.2% above recent trends, driven by three newly active pads. With WTI averaging above $91/bbl and realized prices holding near benchmark, revenue is supported despite only 30% exposure to the high-performing segment captured by satellite monitoring. The concentration of activity—65% of sites active and 10 continuously active—suggests stable operations in core areas, contributing to a deterministic revenue forecast of $4.82B for Q1 2021.
